---
title: "Estimating π"
description: "Use Monte Carlo methods to estimate the value of π by randomly sampling points in a square."
date: "2025-01-02"
categories: [monte-carlo, probability, visualization]
image: "images/estimating-pi.svg"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← Return to Apps](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

script_path = Path("estimating pi/estimating_pi_precompute.py")
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("pi_precompute", script_path)
module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(module)
module.write_data("estimating pi/estimating_pi_data.json", max_n=10000, min_n=10, step=100)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  #quarto-content .content, main.content { max-width: min(1800px, 96vw) !important; }
  #quarto-margin-sidebar, nav#TOC, #TOC-container { display: none !important; }
  #canvas { max-width: 100%; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }
</style>

<div style="margin:20px 0;">
  <label for="n-slider">Sample Size (N):</label>
  <input type="range" id="n-slider" min="10" max="10000" step="100" value="1000" style="width:300px;">
  <span id="n-value" style="margin-left:10px;font-weight:bold;">1,000</span>
</div>

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; align-items: start;">
  <div><canvas id="canvas"></canvas></div>
  <div>
    <h3>Results</h3>
    <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;">
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding:8px;">Sample Size:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-n">-</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding:8px;">Points Inside:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-inside">-</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding:8px;">π Estimate:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-estimate">-</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding:8px;">True π:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-true">-</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding:8px;">Absolute Error:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-error">-</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px;">Standard Error:</td><td style="padding:8px;font-weight:bold;" id="stat-stderr">-</td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
  import { initEstimatingPiApp } from './estimating pi/estimating_pi_d3_app.js';
  initEstimatingPiApp().catch((err) => console.error('Failed to initialize app:', err));
</script>
```
